rewrite.rewritten: Qatar has announced the launch of a new event, with the Ministry of Culture and Sports highlighting that it is expected to attract a significant number of attendees. The authority affirmed that the event is set to be one of the largest of its kind this year, with a notable line-up of participants.
changes_summary: Replaced 'launching a huge new event' with 'announced the launch of a new event' and added attribution to the Ministry of Culture and Sports.
Replaced 'it's going to be amazing' with 'highlighting that it is expected to attract a significant number of attendees' and added attribution.
Replaced 'one of the biggest things this year' with 'one of the largest of its kind this year' and added attribution.
Replaced 'You won't believe how cool the line-up is' with 'a notable line-up of participants' and added attribution.
added_attributions: the Ministry of Culture and Sports

rewrite.rewritten: Qatar Living has announced the launch of a new platform designed to enhance the online shopping experience for consumers in Qatar.
changes_summary: Removed casual and hype language ('SUPER excited', 'game-changing', 'revolutionize', 'mind-blowing', 'must-see').
Replaced first-person with entity-first sentence ('Qatar Living has announced').
Toned down claims to be factual and attribution-heavy.
Removed exclamation marks and informal punctuation.
